ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the data */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather prediction */,
  "wind_speed_100m" REAL /* Wind speed at 100m height in m/s */,
  "wind_direction_100m" REAL /* Wind direction at 100m height in degrees */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "air_density" REAL /* Air density in kg/m^3 */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in hPa */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust speed in m/s */,
  "radiation" REAL /* Radiation in W/m^2 */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at 10m height in m/s */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction at 10m height in degrees */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the specific data point (e.g., sensor, satellite) */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data point (e.g., 95%) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of data (foreign key to data_types table) */,
  "readme" TEXT /* A detailed README file for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the data type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the data type */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value of the weather parameter */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast (e.g., 90%) */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the forecast (e.g., AI, statistical model) */,
  "forecast_status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_data_types" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the version */,
  "version_value" REAL /* Value of the weather parameter for this version */,
  "version_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* A description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
